name: Company Basic v1
description: Company frame with dark-blue-to-teal gradient header bar (for slide title) and subtle white footer with company logo.
guidance: The header bar is a dark-blue-to-teal gradient band at the top. Render the slide title as WHITE text on top of the header image.
The footer is a clean white bar with the company logo (Example Corp Co., Ltd) on the right. It is decorative — do not place text on it.
Title/cover slides should skip both header and footer: call applyBrandFrame(slide, { header: false, footer: false }).
Section divider slides may skip the header: call applyBrandFrame(slide, { header: false }).
For normal content slides, call applyBrandFrame(slide) to apply both header and footer.
Body content (text, charts, tables) must stay inside the safe area. The title text goes on the header bar, not inside the safe area.
